torch_pattern: torch.sum(input_tensor, dim=dim, keepdim=keepdim)  # dim=None reduces all dims
applicability_notes: Direct mapping from registered golden_function. dim may be int, tuple of ints, or None (full reduction). Input may be ROW_MAJOR or TILE layout; tests verify both. Lower numeric precision on row-major bf16 path (atol up to ~8 in tests).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: width reduction dim=-1, keepdim=True, tile layout

placement_observations.source: unit_test: tt_input created with memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG before sum

placement_observations.size_descriptor: expert-dim reduction (dim=0, keepdim=True) of MoE combine output, [K,1,M,H] -> [1,1,M,H]
placement_observations.source: model call site: ttnn.sum(output, dim=0, keepdim=True, memory_config=cfg['sum_experts_output_memory_config']); deepseek MoE prefill/decode, config-driven, DRAM in prefill regime

placement_observations.size_descriptor: full vocab/embedding-width tensor, large last dim
placement_observations.source: model call site: _l2_normalize_ttnn moves input to ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG before pow+sum; chunked sum loop used when width is very large
